name: Tourtiere
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the meat apart and cook slowly together, draining fat when cooked.
2. Simmer the remaining ingredients with the meat mixture for approximately 2 hours, except for the potatoes.
3. Add the potatoes and simmer gently for another 30 minutes.
4. Optionally, add a small amount of flour or cornstarch to thicken the mixture (this may not be necessary).
5. As the mixture cools, it will naturally thicken.
This recipe is very flexible and can easily be divided by thirds (1/3 lb beef, 1/3 lb pork, 1/3 lb veal) and so on. If you make several portions, you might end up with two pies or more. It is traditional in Canada to make multiple pies for the season. Use a hand masher to ensure the potatoes remain in small pieces.
